$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the bundled starter decks. Consumed by two sides that must never drift: the web client (clients/web/src/decklists.ts imports this to populate the lobby) and the engine's agent-vs-agent wire test (crates/rune-cli/tests/agent_game.rs reads this file verbatim and plays every deck to a deterministic completion through the real server). Cards are referenced by authored functional_id only (ADR 0018 §3) — this file encodes no rules, costs, or legality; the server validates every submitted deck against its catalog. Cards are functional definitions sourced from Core Set 2019 (M19); the repository ships no Oracle text, art, or branding (docs/brief.md, ADR 0026). Format: 40-card minimum, at most four copies of any non-basic card, basic lands exempt. Every non-land card is castable from its deck's own land base.

decks.name: Ember Onslaught
decks.summary: Mono-red aggression: fast creatures backed by direct-damage burn.

decks.name: Verdant Coalition
decks.summary: Green-white midrange: mana elves into sturdy creatures, lifegain, and pump.

decks.name: Skyborne Adepts
decks.summary: Mono-blue tempo: evasive flyers and card draw behind hard counters.
